speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so between all of you, including Trinket, you guys are able to imbue, for the next 24 hours, Water Breathing onto the party.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So we're doing this in the morning, right? We're leaving first thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys just said you were doing it before--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, no, no, no, no, yes. We're doing that, but we're leaving in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, we're leaving in the morning though, at dawn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, tomorrow is when you actually venture down to the Aerie.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we swim. Then I'm going to go ahead and cast Water Breathing on all of us now, because it lasts for 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So how many targets can you do with that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we still breathe on land?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think it's up to ten. Let me double-check. I'm pretty sure it's ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, don't worry. In older editions, there were arguments, because they didn't specify.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You have to sleep with a glass of water by the bed.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The finest of gluttonous sweets available in Tal'Dorei are summoned upon this fine mahogany table that thrusts itself out of the sand. Everyone in the vicinity steps back and kind of, "Ooh, ahh," at this display of unexpected magic. Other folks step forward to try and take a piece from it, before somebody else stops them with a hand, "It's not for you!" You guys spend the next hour eating your meal, and gain the benefits of your Heroes' Feast! (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You might want to go shark for one of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Trinket needs to go in the necklace 'cause of the odd man out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought you were being a rider.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would love to, but, there's no one to ride.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can't we have two people on one whale? I feel like whales are very large.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Especially if it's just handles, if it's just like hanging onto a piece of rope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, let's go eat food.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You guys make your way out of the small kelp farming area, eventually back to complete your-- you're doing a Heroes' Feast?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But like ice cream, and donuts, like a midnight snack kind of.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is the meal I was waiting on.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Keyleth, it's your turn. You come to consciousness. Once more you watch as Vax is darting off and a tentacle wraps around him. You see Taryon pulled, but the rest of your allies are rushing off in the distance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah I kind of went unconscience.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are hasted, so yeah, 30 feet. You just get out of the range. It's going to take an attack of opportunity on you with its tentacle. That is-- nine plus 18 is 27 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Halved to ten and you are grappled by the tentacle.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We just gotta get out of here. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna kill this stupid sea puppy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't kill it. Don't kill it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't kill it, get us out of there!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No! No, no, no. Get us out. Get us out.
